FX.title: USD/JPY Tactical Outlook: Momentum Favors Further Upside as 160.00 Tests Begin
tldr_points: MA20 momentum remains bullish with price sustaining above 20-period moving average
RSI(14) maintains positive territory above 50, indicating intact buying pressure
Yuan stability and PBOC reference rate suggest broader Asian FX support for dollar strength
FX.excerpt: Technical momentum and fundamental catalysts align for continued USD/JPY appreciation toward 160.00 psychological barrier.
FX.comment: Bullish momentum intact with price above MA20 and RSI positive; target 160.00 psychological barrier

STOCKS.title: S&P 500 Targets 5,250: Institutional Technical Outlook
tldr_points: Bullish bias supported by price above MA20
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 approaches resistance near 5,200; bullish bias confirmed by RSI 62 and price above MA20. Target: 5,250.
STOCKS.comment: Price holds above MA20 with RSI 62, targeting 5,250

CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD Tactical Outlook: Fundamental Catalysts Dominate Amid Technical Data Gap
tldr_points: SEC safe harbor proposal enters White House review, potential regulatory clarity imminent
On-chain service disruptions (Phantom) and governance disputes (Aave/Chaos Labs) create short-term uncertainty
Political tail-risk from LIBRA/Milei incident may weigh on emerging market crypto sentiment
Technical framework requires updated price data for definitive directional bias
CRYPTO.excerpt: Regulatory catalysts loom large for BTC as SEC proposal enters White House review; technical framework inconclusive pending price data.
CRYPTO.comment: Fundamental catalysts mixed (SEC positive vs operational/governance negatives); technical framework requires price data validation before directional deployment
